name: Cascade School District Tennis Court
description: Come play pickleball at Cascade School District Tennis Court in Leavenworth, WA! There are 6 outdoor hard and concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Chelan Falls Park
description: Come play pickleball at Chelan Falls Park in Chelan Falls, WA! There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms. The court is free.

name: Chelan High School
description: Chelan High School is a place to play pickleball in Chelan, WA. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to lights.

name: Darnell's Lake Resort
description: Darnell's Lake Resort is a place to play pickleball in Chelan, WA. There are 6 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Don Morse Memorial Park
description: Come play pickleball at Don Morse Memorial Park in Chelan, WA! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Harmony Meadows - Tennis Resort
description: Come play pickleball at Harmony Meadows - Tennis Resort in Manson, WA! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Lake Chelan
description: Lake Chelan is a place to play pickleball in Chelan, WA. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Mill Bay Rv Resort
description: Mill Bay Rv Resort is a place to play pickleball in Manson, WA. There is 1 outdoor court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: North Shore Bible Church
description: North Shore Bible Church is a place to play pickleball in Manson, WA. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Rotary Park
description: Rotary Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wenatchee, WA. There are 2 outdoor hard and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Singleton Park
description: Singleton Park is a place to play pickleball in Manson, WA. There is 1 outdoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free.

name: The Leavenworth Lodge
description: Come book a stay at The Leavenworth Lodge in Leavenworth, WA and enjoy two brand new pickle ball courts situated next to the private swimming pool. Lodging for up to 16 guests.  Use discount code Pickleheads10!

name: Walla Walla Point Park
description: Come play pickleball at Walla Walla Point Park in Wenatchee, WA! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are not available. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Wapato Point Resort
description: Wapato Point Resort is a place to play pickleball in Manson, WA. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. Amenities include lights and restrooms.

name: Wenatchee Confluence State Park
description: Wenatchee Confluence State Park is a place to play pickleball in Wenatchee, WA. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Wenatchee Racquet & Athletic Club
description: Wenatchee Racquet & Athletic Club is a place to play pickleball in Wenatchee, WA. There are 14 asphalt courts. 6 are outdoors and 8 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, lights, locker rooms, and trainers or lessons. A one-time fee is required to play.
